productDisplayName: Nike Men Ballista SL White Sports Shoes
description: Sleek and yet aggressively designed, the nike Ballista SL casual shoe is replete with comfort and style. Ergonomically designed and well cushioned, it's a great shoe for runs and casual occasions.UpperMeshed upper for ample breathabilityPerforated synthetic overlays for structure, midfoot support and ventilationAsymmetrical lacing system for snug Fit and protection from chaffingTwill lace running through mid and back foot overlays for enhanced durabilitySynthetic laces for durabilityPlush padded tongue for enhanced comfortCushioned sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fitReinforced overlays on heel cup and above toe guard for enhanced durability and protectionMidsolecushioned footbed for comfort and impact protectionEVA midsole for durability and enhanced shock absorptionPadded back sole to lock the foot in placeOutsoleHigh quality rubber outsole for enhanced durabilityForefoot and backfoot outsole with rectangular lugs and grooves for maximum traction and gripImpact guidance system along the length of the foot for ample impact protection, energy return and propulsionDeep flex groove on mid forefoot for flexible movementArched midfoot to support the inner archForefoot outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe box for enhanced protection to the forefootWash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
